title: Wasabi Panko Salmon with Orange-Ginger Sauce Serves 4(recipe by Emeril Lagasse)
ingredients: ¼ cup toasted black and white sesame seeds, optional
instructions:
In a small plastic container mix all the above ingredients. Cover with a lid and keep with your spices.
**Orange Ginger Sauce**
¼ cup minced shallots
1 tbsp minced fresh ginger
2 tbsp orange zest
1 cup white wine
1 cup fresh orange juice
½ cup heavy cream
2 sticks cold unsalted butter, cut into pieces
1 tsp soy sauce
salt
1/8 tsp wasabi powder
